title: This Dividend King Hiked Its Payout Again: Should You Buy It?
text: Genuine Parts had a record 2021 for earnings, and its outlook looks promising for the foreseeable future.

title: Genuine Parts Company to Report First Quarter 2022 Earnings on April 21, 2022
text: ATLANTA, March 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Genuine Parts Company (NYSE: GPC) plans to release First Quarter Earnings on April 21, 2022. Management will also conduct a conference call on this date at 11:00 a.m.

title: Reasons to Hold On to Genuine Parts (GPC) Stock For Now
text: Genuine Parts (GPC) is in an advantageous position from buyouts that promise synergies and rise in revenues, but is facing the brunt of rising SG&A and unfavorable forex.

title: Dividend Increases: February 12-18, 2022
text: This article series covers dividend changes on a weekly basis.
